title: HealthIndicator
description: A mod similar to uku's health indicator plugin
body:
HealthWarning is a very simple mod that plays the Noteblock PLING sound when the health is under a certain threshold.

## Settings

* A toggle button to turn on and off the mod
* A sound multiplier
* A threshold for how many points before the healthwarning turns on.
* 2 points = 1 heart

## Config menu
![Config menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67af5b0ddf79c8558765796c5783aea82201a3a6.png)
